prevalence.trend: increasing due to better awareness but severely underdiagnosed

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: ACR 2016 criteria, clinical diagnosis in Indian context due to limited resources

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: ACR criteria adapted, clinical diagnosis, limited specialized pain clinics
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Amitriptyline, duloxetine, pregabalin; Limited CBT access; Yoga and mindfulness; Ayurvedic: Ashwagandha, Brahmi for stress/sleep
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Severe underdiagnosis, cultural stigma (dismissed as 'psychological'), limited rheumatology/pain specialist access, lack of awareness
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Affordable generic medications, yoga/meditation integration, Ayurvedic stress management, growing awareness in urban areas
